arts.ttl: Mario Kempes: "No creo que le vaya alacanzar al Real Madrid ante el Getafe"
arts.sum: In addition to the above toggle, you may choose to provide the information requested in this opt-out form, which may enable us to take action on your opt-out election more broadly than just on this digital property. Please note that, because these activities are based on online cookies, your opt-out choice is specific to this property.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid told Jurgen Klopp would REJECT job as Carlo Ancelotti replacement identified
arts.sum: Former Liverpool boss Jurgen Klopp has been identified as a potential successor to Carlo Ancelotti at Real Madrid but an ex-Reds star is not convinced that he will make the move to Spain

arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Real Madrid eye Zubimendi, Huijsen
arts.sum: Real Madrid are interested in Dean Huijsen and Martín Zubimendi, while Arsenal, Aston Villa and Manchester United are looking at Matheus Cunha . - Arsenal and Aston Villa are among the clubs who have held exploratory talks about Wolverhampton Wanderers forward Matheus Cunha, reports Sky Sports, who add that Saudi Arabian clubs are also willing to trigger the 25-year-old's release clause.

arts.ttl: Man United interested in teenager with a release clause of £38m as club battle with Chelsea and Real Madrid to land 17-year-old star
arts.sum: Man United are considering a move for one of the highest rated teenagers in world as Ruben Amorim plans to boost his attacking options following a disappointing Premier League season.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid identify Jurgen Klopp as 'top candidate' as former Liverpool boss sets out stance over Los Blancos job
arts.sum: Real Madrid reportedly learn whether Jurgen Klopp would be open to succeeding Carlo Ancelotti in the dugout ahead of the 2025-26 campaign.

arts.ttl: Getafe vs Real Madrid: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid visit Getafe in La Liga on Wednesday night. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups and more.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid 'given key update on Jurgen Klopp's future', with ex-Liverpool boss earmarked as dream candidate to replace Carlo Ancelotti
arts.sum: With the Spanish champions dumped out of the Champions League and scrambling to stay close to Barcelona in LaLiga, it appears as though Carlo Ancelotti is coming to the end.

arts.ttl: Jurgen Klopp makes feelings clear after being linked with Real Madrid job
arts.sum: Jurgen Klopp is working has head of global soccer at Red Bull, who own a collection of clubs across the world, but has been linked with a surprise return to management

arts.ttl: Churros y Tácticas Podcast: Hay Liga? Can Real Madrid Come Back And Win The League?
arts.sum: Kiyan and Diego also look ahead to the Copa del Rey Final Co-host and chief editor of the Managing Madrid Podcast, Kiyan Sobhani, along with Diego Lorijn — Barca TV, VIVA La Liga TV host, delve into La Liga’s hottest topics.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid injury news: Carlo Ancelotti reveals Kylian Mbappe availability hopes for Copa del Rey final against Barcelona
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti provides an update on Kylian Mbappe's availability for Saturday's Copa del Rey final against Barcelona.
